📚

Microsoft OCs — Course Pipeline

Pick the Microsoft OCs ClickUp xlsx export to populate the dashboard. Your file is parsed entirely in the browser — nothing gets uploaded.

Expected file

  • A ClickUp List Export of the Microsoft OCs project
  • Sheet named Tasks with headers anywhere in the first 20 rows
  • Required columns: Task ID, Parent ID, Task Name, Status, Start Date, Due Date, ROLE ASSIGNED, ACTIVITY TYPE, Assignee
  • Optional but recommended: Name of Stakeholder (owner), MS PHASE (delivery-wave filter)
  • Delivery anchor: a course is "delivered" when its Final Tech Review sub-task is COMPLETE
  • Client handoff: 2U Course Upload task is performed by the 2U team after our delivery

Local-first. Derived data is cached in your browser's localStorage. No server, no upload, no telemetry.

Microsoft OCs · 15 owner buckets · 4 phases

Microsoft OCs — Course Pipeline Overview

Snapshot of 151 courses. Delivery anchor: the course's "QA Validation" task = COMPLETE (or "Final Tech Review" for the older Phase 1 courses that finished before QA Validation was added to the workflow). Client handoff: "2U Course Upload" is the next-step action on 2U's side. Phase filter narrows to delivery waves (Phase 1 / 2 / 3).
